{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240955285186F80718501EAE3518"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7573905289214214937","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一点没看到摆烂"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763439360,"group_id":"7570247230888610840","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3jfoYzLMzyuIPNezByHCH+phRVkfcsudOBMu4Rhgqea","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776878784&x-signature=ERVL9Rcfar7EvAmuYrjtVsb%2FAZk%3D","user_id":"1758812469729896","user_name":"吾神农尝万书"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1758812469729896","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7570247230888610840","book_info":{"abstract":"#迪化 #系统 #架空历史 #爽文 #腹黑 #搞笑
996猝死，我穿越成最不受宠的皇子，本以为能就此躺平，享受人生！
谁知【千古一帝内卷系统】当场激活，完不成任务就得遭受雷劈火化！
没办法，我只能含泪摆烂，随便糊弄，可满朝文武竟都以为我是天纵奇才，硬生生把我抬上了皇位！
我：“这水泥配方是神仙托梦的（我瞎编的）。”
大臣们热泪盈眶：“殿下淡泊名利，为万民献上神物！”
我：“这土豆亩产千斤（系统给的），你们自己种，别烦我。”
丞相五体投地：“殿下心怀天下，一物可安社稷！”
我：“父皇，我真当不了太子，我只想睡觉啊！”
皇帝老泪纵横：“吾儿宠辱不惊，有圣君之姿，这江山非你莫属！”
看着满朝跪拜的迪化天团，我坐在龙椅上欲哭无泪。
够了！你们别再脑补了！我真的只想当个废物啊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/65ed354f26487ed64624a6b83478fde9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"暮云春村","author_id":"","book_id":"7570247230888610840","book_name":"我只想摆烂，奈何全员脑补怪","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":502,"name":"宫廷侯爵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=502&name=宫廷侯爵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7570247462040912408","read_count":"84","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"307363"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"117","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,架空,宫廷侯爵,系统,迪化,穿越,腹黑","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/65ed354f26487ed64624a6b83478fde9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779501328&x-signature=PlYLOV%2Ff6j%2F1UZ1QIbTJUNnYvXw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"506219731623181","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_ite
